name: Hairball Salad with Saliva Dressing
recipeIngredient: 5 large carrots, washed, peeled, and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. With adult assistance, cut the avocado in half.
2. Use a spoon to scoop out the pit.
3. Scoop the avocado meat into a bowl.
4. Add the alfalfa sprouts to the avocado meat and mash with a fork. It is acceptable to leave some lumps.
5. Set the mixture aside.
6. Divide the grated carrots among four salad bowls.
7. Using clean fingers and a spoon, form walnut-sized "hairballs" from the avocado mixture.
8. Arrange the hairballs on top of the grated carrots in each bowl.
9. Pour Italian dressing over the hairballs and serve. Serves 4 cat fanciers.
Sicko serving suggestion: For dessert, squeeze ribbons of chocolate icing onto the backs of your guests' hands to be licked off.
